description.value: **Benefit:** At the beginning of each character level, select one desired terrain type from the following list: cold desert forest jungle mountains (including hills) plains planes (other than the Material Plane) swamp underground (including caves and dungeons) urban water You gain a +2 bonus on all Survival checks made in your desired terrain type. At the beginning of each level, you must select a new desired terrain type to replace the old one (you cannot take the same desired terrain type two levels in a row).
